title: Device Request - Tuya Zigbee Soil Moisture / Temperature Sensor - _TZE284_aa03yzhs / TS0601
excerpt:
### Prerequisites:

- [x] Before requesting a device addition, I have verified there is no existing open issue for this exact device.
- [x] Homey Pro 2023 is running firmware v5 or higher.
- [x] I own and can test a physical example of this device.

### Device Information

- Device Name:
  Tuya Zigbee Soil Moisture / Temperature Sensor (Plant sensor)

- Device Model:
  TS0601 / _TZE284_aa03yzhs

- Device Description:
  Battery-powered Tuya Zigbee soil sensor measuring soil moisture, temperature and battery level.
  The device pairs with Homey but is currently detected as "Unknown" and only exposes a fallback on/off capability.

- Link to device image:
  https://nl.aliexpress.com/item/1005007484918204.html

### Device Interview


{
  "node": {
    "modelId": "TS0601",
    "manufacturerName": "_TZE284_aa03yzhs",
    "ieeeAddress": "a4:c1:38:88:e3:8f:74:ff",
    "networkAddress": 19139,
    "deviceType": "enddevice",
    "receiveWhenIdle": false
  }

### Additional Comments:

Device pairs successfully as a generic Zigbee device but is detected as "Unknown".

Only a fallback on/off capability is available.

No temperature, soil moisture or battery values are exposed.

This is a Tuya TS0601 device using manufacturer-specific cluster 0xEF00.

Similar devices are reported to work correctly in Zigbee2MQTT.

A similar device request for the same physical device has also been submitted to the following fork to increase visibility: https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee

I am happy to provide additional logs, testing feedback or try experimental drivers if needed.

diagComments.excerpt:
Hi! 👋

This device is **already supported** in [dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee) (Universal Tuya Zigbee fork) — **v5.11.14** with 138 drivers and 5,579+ fingerprints.

**Install the latest test version:**
https://homey.app/a/com.dlnraja.tuya.zigbee/test/

**Community forum for support:**
https://community.homey.app/t/app-pro-universal-tuya-zigbee-device-app-test/140352

After installing, delete and re-pair your device. If it still doesn't work, please share a **diagnostic report ID** (device Settings > Create diagnostic report) and a **Homey Developer Tools interview** (https://tools.developer.homey.app).

<!-- tuya-triage-bot -->
Hi! This device is **already supported** in the [Universal Tuya Zigbee fork](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee) v5.11.13 (102 drivers, 29000+ fingerprints).

- `_TZE284_aa03yzhs` -> **soil_sensor** driver

**Install:** https://homey.app/a/com.dlnraja.tuya.zigbee/test/

After installing, delete and re-pair your device. If issues persist, share a diagnostic report ID on the [test forum](https://community.homey.app/t/app-pro-universal-tuya-zigbee-device-app-test/140352).

### Notes:
- **DPs**: Not explicitly mentioned in the issue, so set to `null`.
- **capabilities**: Only a fallback on/off capability is available.
- **errors**: Listed issues with the device detection and exposed capabilities.
- **deviceType**: Specified as `enddevice`.
- **additionalComments**: Includes extra information about the device's behavior and related requests.
